{{Quote|Your progress has been quite satisfactory, Suung Aruh. In the hands of a master you could be shaped into a most useful adept.|Nen Yim on Suung Aruh|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''</ref>}}
'''Suung Aruh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] and a member of the [[Shaper caste]]. A [[Initiate (Shaper)|Shaper Initiate]], he was stationed on the [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] ''[[Baanu Miir]]''. Though he was apprenticed to [[Master Shaper]] [[Tih Qiqah]], Aruh was forced to tell his master crèche-tales with adult overtones, essentially making him a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]]. When [[Nen Yim]] was assigned to the ''Baanu Miir'', Aruh became her apprentice, and he quickly showed promise as a shaper. However, when [[Onimi|Kae Kwaad]] came aboard, Aruh was forced to aid the mad shaper in his quest to create the prefect [[grutchin]], even being used as a stool by Kwaad. Aruh was believed to have been killed when the ''Baanu Miir'' finally died.
